title: Quilted Detention!
description: An (unofficial) client-side modpack for The Detention Room's Minecraft Server!
body:
# ur so going to detention
> _Be so glad that there's a nerd in this group that just so happens to like modding minecraft._
> 
> ~Me, 2024

---

The (unofficial) modpack for the use in The Detention Room's Minecraft server! Include a variety of client-sided mods, mostly QoL with some added Visuals!



Resource Packs are **not** included! At the moment, it automatically installs the custom hats in the server. There is currently no need to have a seperate resource pack.

(I do suggest having [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) & [Its available Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions) to improve your experience. Trust me it works it doesn't have the white eyes bug, i think.)



...by the way if any of the members see this, hai! i actually listened ;3


## **IMPORTANT NOTE!**
This is only usable if your pc can handle 1.20.1! This has a mod that allows a more recent version of Minecraft to connect to the 1.16.5 Server!

~~(I'll go make a 1.16.5 version soon, maybe.)~~

This also does **NOT** include Freecam! A certain bird told me they don't really like that, but i won't stop you from [installing it yourself](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) if you wanted to.
